entries.question: I'm short on attendance - what can I do?
entries.answer: Approach your class mentor early. Genuine medical or family emergencies with documentation may be considered. Attend every remaining class, and note that some departments count NSS/sports activities toward attendance.

entries.question: What should I bring on exam day?
entries.answer: Hall ticket, college ID, transparent pouch with 2 blue/black pens, pencil, eraser, scale, and a transparent water bottle. No mobile phones or smartwatches.

entries.question: Any last-minute revision strategy?
entries.answer: Don't start new topics the night before. Revise one-page summaries, focus on definitions and 2-mark questions, get at least 6 hours of sleep, and reach the hall 30 minutes early.

entries.question: How do I check my attendance percentage?
entries.answer: Log in to the student portal under the 'Attendance' tab - updated weekly. Raise discrepancies with the subject faculty within 7 days.
